message:
test(sync): implement 4 conformance tests for RwLock, Barrier, OnceCell, Notify

The sync primitives RwLock, Barrier, OnceCell, and Notify are now
implemented but their conformance tests (SYNC-003, SYNC-004, SYNC-006,
SYNC-007) were still empty placeholders gated by #[ignore]. Replace the
stubs with full test implementations covering:

- SYNC-003: concurrent readers, writer exclusivity, try_read/try_write,
  cross-thread contention correctness
- SYNC-004: N-way barrier rendezvous, leader election, barrier reuse
- SYNC-006: OnceCell get/set/get_or_init_blocking, duplicate set
  rejection, concurrent init-once guarantee
- SYNC-007: Notify notify_one, notify_waiters, sequential notify_one
  with waiter_count spin-wait synchronisation

All 18 sync_conformance tests pass (previously 4 were ignored).
Full test suite (3043+ tests) passes with no regressions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
